case_title: G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. VS FLORES, FRANCISCO J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $699.87 FILED BY G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, FRANCISCO J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, FRANCISCO J. $699.87 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $756.87, $100 WILL BE PAID 9/6/94. BALANCE STATED ABOVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, FRANCISCO J.
